# 03_IDENTIFY_MANDATORY_REQUIREMENTS

## KEYWORDS
`mandatory` `compliance` `risk` `disqualification` `强制条件` `合规检查` `废标`

---

## TASK
Identify compliance requirements → assess GO/NO-GO → quantify risk

## INPUT
- Bidding document (requirements section)
- Company profile (current capabilities)

## OUTPUT
```json
{
  "admin_check": {pass: true/false, issues: [...]},
  "tech_check": {pass: true/false, capability: %},
  "resource_check": {pass: true/false, gaps: [...]},
  "decision": "GO" | "NO-GO" | "CONDITIONAL_GO",
  "mitigation": [{risk, action, timeline}]
}
```

---

## RISK_CLASSIFICATION

```
CRITICAL (Instant Failure) 🔴
├─ Expired license/certification
├─ Major legal violations
├─ Blacklist status
└─ Action: STOP or find partner

HIGH (Cannot Recover) 🟠
├─ Tech specs below minimum
├─ Required team member unavailable
├─ Cannot meet delivery timeline
└─ Action: Deep analysis, conditional GO

MEDIUM (Recoverable, -30~50 pts) 🟡
├─ Missing documentation
├─ Limited similar experience
├─ Evidence not compelling
└─ Action: Improve content

LOW (Format/Polish, -0~10 pts) 🟢
├─ Typos, layout issues
├─ Minor wording
└─ Action: Final review
```

---

## COMMON_MISTAKES & RECOVERY (常见不足与补救)
